criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app adapts to individual user needs, preferences, and goals using AI.

criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: Specific functionalities within the app that are driven by artificial intelligence, such as personalized workout plans, symptom checking, or nutrition recommendations.

criteria.name: Fitness and Health Focus
criteria.description: The app's primary area of focus, whether it's fitness training, mental health, nutrition, or general well-being.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: How easy and intuitive it is to use the app.

criteria.name: Data Analysis
criteria.description: The app's ability to analyze user data and provide insights and recommendations.
